execution_hold.reason: P0 information-state, value-routing, and target-reliability defects

findings.title: Development-card playability aliases in the neural state
findings.required_fix: Versioned actor dev-used and per-type new/playable development-card features

findings.title: Road Building and discard continuation state is dropped
findings.required_fix: Expose Road Building active/free-roads and discard remainder

findings.title: Public development-card counts are partial and Knight count saturates
findings.required_fix: Use exact unsaturated public played-development counts

findings.title: Monopoly and Year-of-Plenty resource semantics are weak
findings.required_fix: Bind structured resource payloads directly into action scoring

findings.title: Meaningful history loses order, turn boundaries, targets, and payloads
findings.required_fix: Introduce ordered public history v2 with causal encoding

findings.title: Value head is blind to legal affordances
findings.required_fix: Provide a masked legal-action/affordance summary to value

findings.title: Policy updates damage the shared value representation
findings.required_fix: Lower/protect shared trunk or split late policy and value towers

findings.title: Forced-state value downweighting is unisolated
findings.required_fix: Restore 1.0 control and compare phase calibration causally

findings.title: Search surprise does not establish policy-target reliability
findings.required_fix: Reliability-qualify search targets and bind the exact operator

findings.title: Historical learner parent and current producer/evaluator identity diverged
findings.required_fix: Universally bind initializer, teacher, producer, and evaluation incumbent

findings.title: PPO launchers can select a legacy architecture
findings.required_fix: One explicit entity-graph PPO entry point with exact parent binding

findings.title: Action-local topology remains a model ceiling
findings.required_fix: Recommission target joins/topology only after P0 repair

confirmed_non_bugs: fresh optimizer in current final replication
